name: Peanut Butter Fudge - Awp
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and milk in a saucepan.
2. Cook over moderate heat until it reaches the "soft ball" stage, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking to the bottom of the pan.
3. Remove from heat. Beat in butter and peanut butter.
4. Beat until the mixture holds its shape.
5. Pour into a buttered dish to cool.
